creator: alex@hugo.bmg.gv.at
text:
on systems with Compaq Integrated Smart Array controllers hot rebuild
of RAID-Sets does'nt work because ida-firmware must be started by the 
ida driver. This problem is fixed in -current, but i would be happy if
this patch could be imported into -stable too.

How-To-Repeat: remove any disk of a RAID-Set on a runnig system and plug it in again
after a little time has elapsed, no rebuild will happen.
